verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: Æschylus, the son of Agamestor, ruled the Athenians twenty-three years, in whose time Joatham reigned in Jerusalem.

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: And our canon brings Joatham king of Juda within the first Olympiad.
